author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو حنيفة النعمان بن ثابت بن زوطي بن ماه
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Founding jurist of the Hanafi school of Islamic jurisprudence, one of the four major Sunni madhhabs.
author_identification.methodological_stance: Known for his reliance on ra'y (juristic opinion) alongside hadith and Quran.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: This work is part of the Musnad collections, which compile hadiths narrated by a specific transmitter, in this case, Abu Hanifa.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the earliest Musnad collections, important for Hanafi fiqh and hadith studies.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد الرحمن حسن محمود is a known hadith scholar with several tahqiq works, generally regarded as competent.
